account_enabled.description: Indicates if the user account is enabled or not.

age_group.description: Specifies the age group of the user.

city.description: The city where the user is located.

company_name.description: The name of the company the user is associated with.

consent_provided_for_minor.description: Indicates if consent has been provided for a minor.

cost_center.description: The cost center associated with the user.

country.description: The country where the user is located.

department.description: The department the user belongs to.

disable_password_expiration.description: Determines if the user's password expiration is disabled.

disable_strong_password.description: Determines if strong password enforcement is disabled for the user.

display_name.description: The display name of the user, which is required.

division.description: The division within the company the user is part of.

employee_id.description: The employee ID of the user.

employee_type.description: The type of employment (e.g., full-time, part-time) of the user.

fax_number.description: The fax number associated with the user.

force_password_change.description: Indicates if the user is required to change their password on next login.

given_name.description: The given (first) name of the user.

job_title.description: The job title of the user.

manager_id.description: The ID of the user's manager.

mobile_phone.description: The mobile phone number of the user.

office_location.description: The office location of the user.

other_mails.description: A set of additional email addresses for the user.

postal_code.description: The postal code of the user's location.

preferred_language.description: The preferred language of the user.

show_in_address_list.description: Determines if the user should be visible in the address list.

state.description: The state or province where the user is located.

street_address.description: The street address of the user.

surname.description: The surname (last name) of the user.

usage_location.description: The location where the user primarily uses services.

user_principal_name.description: The User Principal Name (UPN) of the user, which is required.
